win_condition: Team wins if psychics correctly identify the true murderer and location in the final revelation

categories.label: Character Phase
categories.description: All psychics must correctly identify their assigned character to proceed

categories.label: Location Phase
categories.description: All psychics must correctly identify their assigned location to proceed

categories.label: Final Revelation
categories.description: Psychics must agree on the true culprit from remaining suspect pairs. Correct = win, incorrect = lose

categories.label: Tickets Remaining
categories.description: Tracks how many rounds were used out of 6. More remaining = better performance
